Functions for Bluetooth device management, UUID expansion, pairing info checks, and a build script.

## Folders
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Functions for Bluetooth device management, UUID expansion, and SMPairingInfo state checks.

## Files
- **[bt_device.c](bt_device.c.md)**: Functions for initializing, comparing, and validating Bluetooth device addresses and states.
- **[bt_uuid.c](bt_uuid.c.md)**: Functions to expand 16-bit and 32-bit Bluetooth UUIDs.
- **[sm_util.c](sm_util.c.md)**: Functions for comparing and checking the validity of Bluetooth pairing information.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling the libbtutil library with different environment configurations.
